blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: He was at dinner. He was laughing. He made a toast.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: Okay. Okay. Nobody goes back upstairs.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: We wait for the police first. Then we call.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: He didn't seem sick. I mean — he seemed off this weekend, but not —

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: I'm just saying. He was twenty-nine. People don't —

blocks.speaker: Wren Cole
blocks.content: Everyone just stop. We don't know anything yet.
Wren was right. But she said it like someone who already suspected knowing would cost them something.

blocks.prompt: The group is falling apart in real time. Who does Julian watch?

options.label: Cade. He's the most visibly fractured.
Nadia. She's the stillest person in the room.
Wren. She told everyone to stop like she had a reason to.
